    Index

    A B C D E F G H I K L M N O P R S T U V W Y 
    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Constant Field Values|Serialized Form

    F

    find(int) - Method in class algorithms.UnionFind
    Finds the representative (root) of the set that element x belongs to.
    findAllDistances(List<Node>, Node) - Static method in class algorithms.Dijkstra
    Computes the shortest distances from a start node to all other nodes using Dijkstra's algorithm.
    findAlternativePaths(List<Node>, Node, Node, Student, int) - Static method in class algorithms.SmartDijkstra
    Finds alternative optimized paths based on different optimization weights.
    findAlternativeRoutes(Edge) - Method in class utils.BookingSystem
    Finds alternative available routes from the same source as the given route.
    findCenter(List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.SD2
    Finds the center of the graph (node with minimum sum of distances to others).
    findCheaperRoutes(Edge, double) - Method in class utils.BookingSystem
    Finds cheaper available routes within the student's budget from the same source.
    findConnectedComponents(List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.Bfs
    Finds all connected components in the graph using BFS.
    findMST(List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.Kruskal
    Finds the Minimum Spanning Tree (MST) of the given graph using Kruskal's algorithm.
    findOptimalPath(List<Node>, Node, Node, Student, SmartDijkstra.OptimizationWeights) - Static method in class algorithms.SmartDijkstra
    Finds the optimal path using a multi-objective Dijkstra algorithm.
    findOptimalPath(List<Node>, Node, Node, Student, SmartDijkstra.OptimizationWeights, List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.SmartDijkstra
    Same as findOptimalPath but with animation sequence tracking.
    findSD2Edges(List<Edge>, List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.SD2
    Finds additional edges to be added to the MST to ensure the resulting graph has a diameter of at most 2.
    findShortestPath(List<Node>, Node, Node) - Static method in class algorithms.Dijkstra
    Finds the shortest path between a start node and an end node using Dijkstra's algorithm.
    findStudentById(String) - Method in class utils.BookingSystem
     
    floydWarshall(List<Node>) - Static method in class algorithms.SD2
    Applies the Floyd-Warshall algorithm to compute all-pairs shortest paths.
    formatCost(double) - Static method in class resources.Global_variables
     
    formatDistance(double) - Static method in class resources.Global_variables
     
    formatTime(double) - Static method in class resources.Global_variables
